name: Private Fairway Bountiful
about: Private Fairway Bountiful is an indoor golf training studio that utilizes TrackMan 4 technology to provide 24-hour access to golfers in Utah. The facility features a TrackMan launch monitor that captures 26 data points for every swing, enabling members to practice with detailed feedback to improve their distance and accuracy. The studio operates on a membership-based model with various tiers, including unlimited monthly, 6-month unlimited, and session-based punch passes. With a limited membership of 35 per location, the studio emphasizes accessibility and quality practice time for its members.
why_golfers_like_it: TrackMan 4 technology provides 26 data points for precise swing analysis
24-hour access allows for flexible practice around busy schedules
Limited membership ensures good access to tee times and a quality experience
Members report lowering their official handicap by 6-10 strokes

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs. The venue is designed for golfers to use their personal equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service at the venue, suggesting outside food and drinks may not be permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required for 18 holes. Sessions are blocked in 50-minute increments with 10 minutes between.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific mention of kid-friendly amenities or policies, suggesting it may be geared more toward adult golfers.
